[Total Assault Open]

Total Assault - Shiro & Kuro (Urban Warfare) has opened, at 2:00 AM (UTC) on 9/27 (Tue).

Are you ready to challenge Shiro & Kuro, now that they're even stronger under the new "Insane" difficulty (Attack Type: Piercing)?
